scores.correctness_notes: Covers all supported bases and architectures, single-base, multi-base shorthand and long form, cross-compilation patterns — all matching gold standard
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor: 'build-base: devel' phrasing (gold says 'ubuntu@devel' as build-base); mentions CRAFT_PLATFORM env var and --platform flag which aren't in gold standard but are plausible charmcraft features; 'build-on: arm64' cross-compile example differs slightly from gold's riscv64 example but isn't wrong
